name: Session Manager
description: Active sessions panel showing current device, other sessions with device info, location, last active, and revoke controls.

standard.description: Full session list with current device highlighted

slots.current-session: This device session card with 'Current' badge

slots.sessions-list: Other sessions with device, browser, location, last active

visual_brief: Settings panel showing active login sessions. The current session is highlighted at the top with a 'Current Session' badge, showing device name (e.g., 'MacBook Pro — Chrome'), location, and last active time. Below, a list of other sessions, each showing device icon (desktop/mobile/tablet), browser name, location (city, country), last active timestamp, and a 'Revoke' button on the right. A 'Sign Out All Other Sessions' destructive button sits at the bottom of the list. Sessions with suspicious activity show a warning icon.

responsive.mobile: Sessions stack as full-width cards. Device info and location on separate lines. Revoke button full-width per session. Sign Out All button at the bottom.
responsive.tablet: Standard list layout. Device info and location inline. Revoke buttons on the right.
responsive.desktop: Full list with all information inline per row. Comfortable spacing between sessions.

composition.CurrentSession: Card(d-surface, accent-border) > [DeviceIcon + DeviceInfo > [Name(font-medium) + Location + LastActive(text-muted)] + CurrentBadge(d-annotation)]
composition.SessionRow: Row(d-data-row) > [DeviceIcon + DeviceInfo > [Name + Location + LastActive(text-muted)] + RevokeButton(d-interactive, variant: destructive)]
